query:
SELECT mt.id, mt.name, mt.icon, mt.sortOrder, mt.erpCompanyId, ec.name as company_name 
FROM material_types mt 
LEFT JOIN erp_companies ec ON mt.erpCompanyId = ec.id 
WHERE mt.deletedAt IS NULL 
ORDER BY mt.erpCompanyId, mt.sortOrder, mt.id;
